title: gouldia ovata var. heterophylla
intro: Gouldia ovata var. heterophylla, also known as the Heterophyllous Gouldia, is a plant species in the Myrtaceae family that is native to Australia. The medicinal properties of Gouldia ovata var. heterophylla include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of using Gouldia ovata var. heterophylla include reducing inflammation, soothing skin irritations, and supporting the immune system. The herbal preparations of Gouldia ovata var. heterophylla include teas, infusions, and topical applications, which can be made by steeping its leaves in hot water or mixing its extracts with carrier oils.
